name: Taco Spread
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix cream cheese and sour cream together until smooth and lump-free.
2. Add taco seasoning to taste (about 1/2 packet) and mix well.
3. Stir in picante sauce to taste and combine thoroughly.
4. Spoon the mixture onto a serving platter.
5. Sprinkle chopped lettuce, finely chopped tomatoes, and shredded cheddar cheese over the top.
6. Serve with nacho chips.
